programme.title: Bonanza

In return, Ben only wants his investment money back, plus fifteen percent. Tom and his hired hand Ezekiel are suspicious of Ben, but Tom agrees to the deal. The Cartwright men build the mill, but tension begins to rise when Ezekiel makes comments which rekindle Tom's suspicion.

programme.title: Heritage Falls

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Torches, Stained Glass, Wind Chimes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Jill starts in Hilo, Hawaii where she meets Leilehua Yuen, a metal torch maker. Leilehua shows Jill the techniques she learned from her father that she continues to use today. In Denver, Colorado, Jill meets Phil Watkins, a traditional stained glass creator that is carrying on a centuries old family artistry. Finally, in Austin, Texas, she visits Davis and Franz Blanchard, a father and son team who create a special wind chime for Jill with a decidedly Texas melody.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Illinois: Did you know ice cream sundae was given its name in Evanston, Illinois? Well, this week, singer and entertainer Taylor Hicks enjoys a few scoops of the creamy confection as he tastes his way across Illinois looking to discover the state's most emblematic foods. Come along as he visits the cornfields that produce the official state snack: popcorn. He also learns how to bake the perfect bread for the famous Italian beef sandwich, and he heads to the windy city to get the low down on deep-dish pizza and the Chicago-style hot dog. To top it all off, Taylor visits the birthplace of the ice cream sundae. It's a plateful of Illinois cuisine filled with the stories and legends behind the state's tastiest foods.

programme.title: Turquoise Fever
programme.desc: Turquoise Fever - Mo' Money, Mo' Problems: While prospecting for a new turquoise mine, the Ottesons discover an abundance of variscite, a gemstone that has recently grown in popularity. The family quickly gets to work to open their first variscite claim. The news of their promising discovery reaches Trenton when he's home with JaKell during the last days of her complicated pregnancy. With Trenton excited and anxious, JaKell assures him she will be fine if he goes out for the day to check out the new claim. For all their help and hard work, Donna and Danny give Tristan and Lane control of their very first mine. Eager to get started, the brothers set up their first dynamite blast, but due to their inexperience, the results are disappointing. Tony and Emily celebrate their tenth wedding anniversary in true Otteson fashion, searching for riches on their new claim.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - John Colter: King of the Mountain Men: As a member of Lewis and Clark's Corps of Discovery, John Colter travels from the Missouri River all the way to the Pacific Ocean, but he decides not to return to the civilized East when the expedition ends. Entranced by the beauty and adventure of the wild frontier, he becomes one of America's first mountain men. As a hunter, trapper and explorer in his own right, he's the first American to see the Grand Tetons and the epic Yellowstone Valley. While his epic explorations make him famous, it's a harrowing ordeal with Blackfeet warriors that makes him a legend. After boldly venturing into territory controlled by the Blackfeet tribe, Colter is captured, stripped naked, and forced to run for his life as warriors give chase in what will come to be known as Colter's Run.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - On a Mission: It's a rope-swinging episode of The Cowboy Way! After their restaurant venture, each of the cowboys takes some quality time to reconnect with family and discuss their futures. Cody decides to make the ranch high-tech, but will it be a success or will he get his wires crossed? Bubba plays locksmith for Booger's truck. A missing cow gets stuck in the woods. The guys use Booger's annual horse clinic as a way to give back to the community. And get ready for matchmaking the cowboy way! When the boys set up a mixer for bachelors Frankie and Hodge, speed-dating turns into a literal horse race to win the ladies' affections.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: One, Two, Boom! // Out of the Woods // House Paint // Caillou's Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Caillou is awoken by a thunderstorm. // Caillou spends the day with Miss Martin, Clementine and Leo on a nature hike through the woods. // When Caillou sees Dad painting the house he wants to join in on the fun. // It's a beautiful fall day and Caillou wants to spend the entire day outside playing in the leaves.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Say Cheese // Finders Keepers // A Frog in Caillou's Throat // Caillou the Great
programme.desc: Caillou tries his hand at being family photographer and discovers it can be a pretty tricky job. // Caillou and Leo can't find Caillou's airplane anywhere but their hunt through the house turns up all sort of other lost items. // After getting caught in the rain, Caillou loses his voice. // Caillou is invited to Leo's birthday party and is overjoyed when he discovers there will be a magician present.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Clowning Around // Read All About It // Mom For a Day // Caillou Plays Baseball
programme.desc: Caillou visits Grandma who shows him a book about clowns she got from the library. // Caillou and Mom go to the library for story time. // Caillou helps Daddy look after Rosie. // When Caillou notices that Dad and Grandpa are captivated by a baseball game on TV, he wants to get in on the excitement.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's New Babysitter // Caillou Goes to a Theme Park // Caillou's School Bus // Caillou Sleeps Over // Caillou Hurts Himself
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are going out. Caillou wants his regular babysitter, not Julie, whom he has never met before. // Caillou and his family have a wonderful day out at a theme park. // Caillou doesn't go to school yet but he really wants to ride on the school bus that stops outside his house every morning. // Caillou is going to spend the night away from his home and family for the very first time. // Poor Caillou! He's fallen off his bike and scraped his knee.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Star Light, Star Bright // All in a Day's Work // The Cat's Meow // Caillou In Space
programme.desc: Caillou and the family are at Grandma & Grandpa's for an evening corn roast. // The house wakes up late, and that means it's mad rush to get off to work and off to childcare. // It's time for Gilbert's annual visit to the Vet. // When Caillou plays astronauts with Leo he upsets Rosie.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: The Treasure Chest // A Camping We Will Go // Chopsticks // A Special Dog
programme.desc: Caillou is helping Mom clean out the attic. // The family goes away for a weekend of camping in the woods. // Caillou has dinner at Sarah's house and discovers new foods and a new way to eat them. // Caillou and Mom meet a fascinating woman in the park.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou Beats the Heat // Back Seat Driver // Lost and Found // Holiday Magic
programme.desc: It's hot and steamy and Mom won't let Caillou go to the public pool. // Caillou, Dad and Rosie are in the car on their way to meet mom. // When Dad and Caillou find a scruffy dog that appears to be lost they bring it home. // Caillou and his family pay a visit to Santa and go Christmas tree shopping all in the same day.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Downhill From Here // Next Stop Fun // Under Sail // Farmer Caillou
programme.desc: Mom, an avid skier, takes Caillou downhill skiing while Dad and Rosie sit in the cozy chalet and watch. // Caillou is very excited when the family takes a trip across country by train. // Caillou finds an old toy sailing boat. // Mr. Hinkle invites Caillou to visit his sister's farm.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Sunday Brunch // Caillou to the Rescue // Caillou's Top Bunk // Recipe For Fun
programme.desc: Caillou, Dad and Rosie take Mom out for Sunday brunch to celebrate Mother's day. // Gilbert gets caught up a tree, and to Caillou's delight a fire truck full of firefighters has to be called in to rescue him. // Caillou and Rosie get to spend the night at Grandma and Grandpa's house. // Dad drives Caillou to Grandma's for the day.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: New Kids on the Block // Caillou Goes to School // Caillou's Kitchen // Caillou's Sea Adventure
programme.desc: Walking by the empty lot at the end of the street, Caillou and Dad notice the real estate sign showing that it's been sold. // When Sarah's school has a little sister or brother day, Sarah decides to invite Caillou. // Mom is preparing a feast for guests and Caillou wants to help. // It's another rainy day and Caillou decides to invite a friend over to play.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: The Little Bird // Lights Out // Caillou's Check Up // Calling Dr. Caillou
programme.desc: Caillou and Sarah find a baby bird that fell from its nest. // A winter storm knocks the power out at Caillou's home. // It's time for Caillou's visit to the dentist. // Caillou is really looking forward to a special day at work with Dad.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Pumpkin Patch Kid // Caillou's Got Rhythm // Do It Yourself // Caillou's Big Sale
programme.desc: Grandpa and Caillou go for a visit to a pumpkin patch. // During a visit to the park with Grandma, Caillou and Rosie see some musicians playing outside. // After Caillou sees what Clementine is giving her Dad for Father's Day, he wants to give his Daddy something just as special. // Caillou's very excited about he neighborhood rummage sales.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Toys and Colors

programme.title: Ryan's World

programme.title: Jason Vlogs

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strenghs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Mobius is suffering a crime spree and all the evidence points to Sonic as the culprit. But the real thief is a lab rat wearing a high-tech vehicle suit who was sent by Robotnik to discredit our hero.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Hacker, an adolescent mole computer whiz steals a super-intelligence program from Robotnik's computer, Sonic has to protect him, smashing Grounder to pieces.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Professor Von Schlemmer (from Too Tall Tails) has created a machine which brings dreams to life. When Robotnik hears about it, he forces the Professor to alter the machine so that nightmares come to life.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli fires slugs right and left during a fast-paced slugout on mecha-back! "See you back home," Eli tells the slugs he has to leave behind as he races across a cavern during the fight. The battle won, the Shane Gang is on its way back home when Eli runs into a situation that he can't ignore. One thing leads to another and Eli ends up challenged to a duel. Only one problem, Eli's doesn't have Burpy or the rest of his best slugs! They're still on the way back home!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Driven by his intense slug phobia, scientist Quentin Kozinski has invented mechanical slugs. Armed with this fearsome arsenal, he sets out to prove that science can beat any slug and any slinger including the Shane Gang! But Eli is determined to prove that no thinking, living thing can ever be bested by a machine.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious slugslinging master appears for the first time in 20 years. Though old, this slinger is an amazing battler incredibly fast and the master of an unstoppable slinging technique. Eli, Kord, Trixie and Pronto all want to study with the master and learn this awesome move. But so does Dr. Blakk's protégé Twist! Now Eli must face off against Twist and prevent the master from choosing a villain for a student.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Blakk has hired Brutale - a thug as brutal as his name - to build a Deep Water Rig to drill for Dark Water at the bottom of the Cavern Sea. Needing some water-breathing labor for the job, Brutale steals Marvolio Drake's reptilian pirate crew. Desperate to get his men back, Drake forms an unlikely alliance with the Shane Gang, who are just as desperate to shut the Dark Water rig down.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Using some stolen Shadow Clan tech, Dana Por is able slip in and out of any cavern in Slugterra - and rob them blind! But when she makes the mistake of stealing from Dr. Blakk, Eli is the only one who can protect her from The Gentleman, a suave but deadly mercenary Blakk hires to take back what was stolen from him - and bring back the scalp of the girl who stole it!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Lumino cavern is under attack! A swarm of Neurotox ghoul slugs have created a massive toxic cloud that's attacking the residents. The Shane Gang must brave an inescapable maze called the Cavern of Time to locate Blite, the only man who knows enough about regular Neotox slugs to help them stop the cloud created by the ghouls. Just a few problems with that plan: Blite is a deadly maniac, whose reign of terror ended only after Will Shane trapped him in the Cavern of Time.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and Kord have been trying to create a fusion shot: two slugs shot at exactly the same time that can merge their powers! But they'll need to mod Eli's blaster to handle it. In search of the one missing part that will complete Eli's Double Barreled Blaster, the gang journey to the Scrap Heap, a junk yard cavern of epic proportions. Finding the part isn't easy. Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang find themselves competing in the Slugball Championship - a rough and tumble cross between hockey, slugslinging and rugby - with deadly random obstacles thrown in for fun! Eli suspects the rival team is cheating, but he's going to have to prove it first... that is if he can survive the game!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Blippi and The Holiday Snow Globe
programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah as they learn all about festive seasons for different people around the world! Learn about Christmas and decorate a tree with Santa, Learn about Kwanzaa with Baba The Storyteller and Hanukkah at The Westside Jewish Community Center!

programme.title: Berry Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest they are entering.

programme.title: Berry Bitty Adventurer
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Foods that are Super Powerful
programme.desc: Avery makes a power-packed dinner with Chef Robert Bartley who makes meals for Toronto's top sports teams. Lily stops at the Healthy Butcher for super-charged chicken and veggie sausages. Things heat up in the kitchen for the big chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Foods that are Wrapped
programme.desc: Can a meal be wrapped like a present? Lily finds out with Chef John Klianis when they prepare Spanakotiropita. Avery makes authentic Mexican tacos at La Tortilleria. Together with Matt, they wrap things up with meals in a package, or “En Papillotte” as the French say.

programme.title: A Surprise Visit, Stolen Treasure, A Flower For Olive
programme.desc: EP16: When Tijinou and Tijibelle lands on Lil'Pirate's beach, Lil'Pirate announces to them a huge surprise: the visit of Anoki the Inuit! EP17: Lil'Pirate takes big steps on the beach, including when Tijinou and Tijibelle arrive. And three steps towards the North! Then two steps towards the East! Then ten steps due South! Lil'Pirate arrives at the foot of the rock. One-thousand sardines! His treasure is there! He's sure of it! EP18: When Tijinou and Tijibelle arrive in the area surrounding the lighthouse, they notice Pauline the Octopus on the rocks, the 5 tentacles clinging to the ground, like stumps, and the body tense like a tent…

programme.title: Percival's Island, Bracelet for Olive, The Princess's Crown
programme.desc: EP19: When Tijinou and Tijibelle land on Lil'Pirate's beach, Lil'Pirate leads them to his favorite hideout: shhhh! He has a secret! He looks all around him, there's no one! He takes out a map! It's the map to go on a fabulous and magical island...EP20: For the birthday of Pauline the Octopus, Edmond wants to offer her a bracelet made of shells.EP21: The princess has broken a little part of her crown. Tijinou and Tijibelle will have to find the clown with the glue to repair it.

programme.title: Blippi Visits Rhythm Discovery Center
programme.desc: Make music with Blippi in this episode on percussion.

programme.title: High Tech Drama
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: A Berry Merry Birthday
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: The Magic Rainbow -Winx Club
programme.desc: As an important ball is taking place at Domino Castle, Kalshara and Brafilius are at Graynor Ruins to catch the Creature with the Rainbow Coat, in order to absorb its magic power. However, Kalshara's attempt fails, unleashing chaos between Wild Magic and Fairy magic, making the colours of Magix big rainbow blur into each other. Warned by Roxy, the Winx and their Fairy Animals enter the Rainbow MiniWorld: Musa and Critty manage to restore the balance of that magic place, thanks to their special magic sensitivity. In order to thank the Winx, the Creature with the Rainbow Coat reveals the Winx (being spied upon by Kalshara and Brafilius) that the Animal with the Ultimate Power is strictly linked to the fairies' power.

programme.title: Baby Winx -Winx Club
programme.desc: Kalshara e Brafilius think that the Animal with the Ultimate Power is one of the Fairy Animals bonded with the Winx. After setting a trap to the six fairies, Brafilius casts a time-reversal spell on their Stones of Memories, making the Winx turn back into little girls. As the Specialists, seeing them, mistake them for young tourists of the Animal Rescue Park, Kalshara easily catches their Fairy Animals… except for Bloom's unicorn. Despite the fact they are only little girls, the Winx manage to send away Brafilius with their magic, creating a funny circus show, and Elas attacks Kalshara, convincing her to leave. Bloom's unicorn, with his power, finally manages to make the Winx turn back to normal.

programme.title: A Basket of Blueberries
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying! Unaware that Strawberry has promised Blueberry she'll take care of Huck at the ball, and feeling sorry for their friend, Lemon and Raspberry independently decide to dress up like Blueberry and fill in for her—neither knowing that the other is also doing so!

programme.title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. “I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!” says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed. To mark the occasion, and to honor all that Berrykin Bloom has done for Berry Bitty City, she decrees that they will have a Berrykin Bloom day, and there will be a ceremony in his honor. Berrykin Bloom is very humble about the whole thing, but the girls wish there was something special they could do to help honor him on his big day.

programme.title: Food that make you Pucker
programme.desc: In this sour half-hour, Avery and Chef Winlai Wong make Pork Pot Stickers with a sour vinegar sauce. Lily follows a cucumber's journey to becoming a sour pickle at a pickle factory. In the kitchen, Matt challenges them to make fruity ice pops with serious pucker power.

programme.title: Foods that make you Smile
programme.desc: Some foods just put a smile on your face! For Avery, it's mini carrot cupcakes with Chef Morag Cleevely. Lily is all smiles while visiting a chocolate maker. Then it's cooking time with Matt, where they make 3 kinds of delicious fries that are actually good for you!

programme.title: Toys and Colors | Rhymes & Rescues!
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show | Princess of Play!
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad | Slimy Go Fish!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity | Gummies and Games!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Slimy DIY!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Noodly Fun!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox | Ultimate mishmash Vol 5

programme.title: Wow, I Never Knew That!
programme.desc: A whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed with exciting tidbits and fascinating facts that uncover the truths and origins behind the stuff you're already familiar with.

programme.title: The Shadownsters
programme.desc: Solomon and Gretta are ready to get some sleep. When their father switches off the light, Gretta falls asleep and Solomon, very scared, tries to hide under the sheets. Suddenly, he hears a weird noise. Solomon is frightened and calls Pancho, his reliable plush, who comes to life and helps him to discover a terrible monster, a Shadownster.

programme.title: KIDZ BOP Kids
programme.desc: KIDZ BOP, the #1 Music Brand for Kids

programme.title: Bubble Bip
programme.desc: The hilarious adventures of Bubble Bip, a video game hero who slings bubbles at sassy squids, and the zany group of Earth kids he makes friends with.

programme.title: Underwater Demolition Mission!! (Minecraft Island Survival) Part 15
programme.desc: Let's play Minecraft Hardcore Survival! In this episode, the Pink Sheep Clan SEAL Team carries out a dangerous underwater demolition mission to acquire Prismarine from an Ocean monument!

programme.title: Patronus the Magic Cat! (Minecraft Island Survival) Part 7
programme.desc: Let's play Minecraft Hardcore Survival! In this episode, we sail west to find a Cat to tame (and name Patronus) to scare away the Dementors! (aka Phantoms)

programme.title: Pop It!
programme.desc: "Pop It!" interactive dance-along TV series for kids age 6 to 11 that offers fun, exercise and entertainment.

programme.title: Limon and Oli
programme.desc: Sweet little Limon and her rambunctious friend Oli look for snow monsters, hunt for treasure, learn to play musical instruments and more.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Sparkle Power
programme.desc: Power through the day with some sparkle and shine!

programme.title: Tales of Tatonka
programme.desc: Share great laughs and thrilling adventures with Wanji, Nunpa, Yamni and Topa, four daring wolf-cubs. Our four heroes and their friends learn to grow together as a family and discover the world around them.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: The Pirates Next Door
programme.desc: A small town's quiet life is suddenly turned upside down by the arrival of a family of pirates! For Matilda, her new neighbors are a dream come true! With Jim Lad, the Jolley-Rogers' son, around, there's no chance of getting bored.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight
programme.desc: It is the year 2030, and the stage is the capital of Japan, Chou-Tokyo. Through "Buddyfight", humans have started cultural interactions with residents from other worlds called "Affinity Dimensions". Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). These battles have high significance and sometimes it is even used to decide the fate of a nation, and naturally there are those who seek to use the Buddy Monsters for evil purposes.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: LOL Block

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child's life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Bad Hair Day // Ice is Nice
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: The Rainbow Wave // The Best Pet You Never Met
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Dilemma // Ruby and the Beast
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

The Bear sends her for a walk to the forest and gives her a cell phone in order to be safe. As a result Masha annoys him with her calls for any trivial reasons and when she finds herself in real danger, the Bear doesn't an-swer the phone ...

programme.title: Luna Chip & Inkie Adventure Rangers Go: Super Helpful
programme.desc: After declaring himself the town Fixer-Upper, Chip is laser focused on fixing every item on Eagle Creek's To Do list. Problem is he never takes the time to find out what exactly his neighbours need done. So instead of inflating a flat tire or patching a leaky tent, he's creating all new problems and making things way worse! Before Chip knows it, he and Mr. Crumple are in a sup'ed up, runaway Sweepy, careening through town. Help! It's Inkie and Luna to the rescue! But first they need to ask a sheepish Chip exactly what kind of help he needs. Um, fixing all his fixes?!
