programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Robert Mac
programme.desc: Robert's award-winning comedy is smart, subtle, and silly. Not too smart and not too subtle, but occasionally a bit more silly than youíd expect. And always clean. Robert is a regular at some of the finest comedy clubs around the country. Winner of "Comedy Centralís Laugh Riots." Finalist at "Billy Crystalís Mr. Saturday Night Contest", "San Francisco International Comedy Competition", "Boston Comedy Festival", "Jerry Lewis MDA Telethon Talent Search."

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Sarcastic and self-deprecating, Bill Boronkay jokes about being too ugly to work for ESPN, dating out of his tax bracket, and how society is centered around parents.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Scott Long tosses out sharp and clever lines that remind you of the differences between funny people and true comedic artists.

programme.title: Leanne Morgan: So Yummy

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Spark of Insanity

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 80's horror classic! When four baloonists crash land on a remote island, one thing is for sure: they have a dog named Melvin! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill as they take a trip to Frankenstein Island!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater give their comedic riffing treatment to this martial arts flick starring Cythnia Rothrock. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Honor And Glory!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a helpful Sentencesmith from the island of Grammaria. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Making Sense with Sentences!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this "so bad it's still bad" movie where Estonian cyborgs shoot lasers out of their eyes! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Firehead!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The Little Unicorn is a tale of whimsy, fantasy, and extremely generous definitions of the word “little.” This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: Committed
programme.desc: Psychologist Celeste DuPont (Roth) decides to relocate.

programme.title: Waking Up to Danger
programme.desc: A young mother attempts to heal after a horrible accident damages her memory.

programme.desc: Meet the Rizzos, a fuedel family in the throws of battle as their bizarre and layered lies unravel.

programme.title: Henry Poole Is Here

programme.title: The Miracle Season
programme.desc: In the inspiring true-life drama THE MIRACLE SEASON, one girl's story leads her team and town to victory.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: A basketball coach has a winning team when Hurricane Katrina hits. He tries to build a winning team anew.

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: When Jessica (Amy Smart) meets champion swing dancer Jake, sparks fly. They decide to compete for the title.

programme.title: A Step Toward Tomorrow
programme.desc: A family learns to deal with the paralysis of their younger son through the wisdom of newfound friends.

programme.title: The Nature of Romance
programme.desc: A busy travel writer goes glamping at a state park with her best friend and finds herself falling in love with one of the park rangers.

programme.title: Shadow of Fear
programme.desc: When a young man accidentally kills someone, he is plunged into a rich man's world of blackmail and murder.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image upgrader Rebecca discovers the best version of herself might include stubborn client Clive.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A distant father (Kevin Sorbo) and a lost girlfriend to his best friend (Ben Davies) leads Nathan (Jason Burkey) on a journey of rediscovery.

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: Journalist Amy goes undercover at a happiness retreat and falls for Paul, the investor's son.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is superb as Maverick Mitchell, a young flyer who's out to become the best. And Kelly McGillis plays the instructor who teaches Maverick a few things you can't learn in a classroom.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole's career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers (2011)
programme.desc: A gifted ensemble cast sparks this bold retelling of Alexander Dumas' classic tale of friendship and heroism. With Christoph Waltz as wily Cardinal Richelieu.

programme.title: Girls! Girls! Girls!
programme.desc: Elvis plays a charter-boat skipper who helps tourists land the big ones. Of course, plenty of beautiful girls want to land Elvis. But there's something Elvis likes almost as much as romance–a boat!

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: Robert Redford stars as Jay Gatsby, who had once loved beautiful, spoiled Daisy Buchanan (Mia Farrow), then lost her to a rich boy. But now Gatsby is mysteriously wealthy...and ready to risk everything to woo Daisy back.

programme.title: Icetastrophe
programme.desc: A piece of a meteor strikes the center of a small mountain town and causes deadly freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Six people come together during an elaborate bank heist during which any move can alter the outcome. Is it coincidence, or are they merely pawns in a much bigger game?

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Picture Locked: Chris Temple & Zach Ignasci
programme.desc: Picture Locked is an immersive retrospective with documentary filmmakers providing an in-depth breakdown of their breakthrough works, taking audiences shot by shot through the twists and turns of their process, while dissecting their own journeys as directors and the industry at large.

programme.title: International Space Orchestra
programme.desc: Featuring original music by Arthur Jeffes of Penguin Cafe and music written by Blur and Gorillaz frontman Damon Albarn, singer Bobby Womack and producer Richard Russell and Japanese superstar and Otamatone inventor, Maywa Denki. Join the International Space Orchestra—an assembly of star-spangled space scientists from NASA—in the adventure of performing a unique drama of non-terrestrial communication and the techno-wonders of mission control rooms.

programme.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Fork In The Road
programme.desc: We are at a fork in the road. Which path we take will dictate the course of the lives and livelihoods of billions of people. AI will either empower greater human agency…or it will undermine it.

programme.title: Future Forward: the Series
programme.desc: Future Forward is a character-driven documentary series featuring people and businesses pioneering industry innovation on the front lines of climate change. Each film profiles visionaries fighting for their dream of a better world, the complex hurdles to igniting corporate change on a global scale, and a contagious hope—and inspiration—for the future.

programme.title: Crypto Farmers
programme.desc: Can you make money from manure? Farms are struggling to get by in this modern world. Farmers are forced to diversify their income steams in order to survive. With a remarkable new invention from a young entrepreneur farmers in rural Wales are now heating up piles of cow manure to power crypto mining rigs.

programme.title: Mala Onda
programme.desc: Farm animals are being killed all across Puerto Rico and no one knows what's going on. The animals are found with two circular incisions, but no blood. Experts from different backgrounds, farmers who lost animals, and eye witness's explain what they think is happening. Is the Chupacabra a symbol of destruction or a cause for unity? A DOCUMENTARY+ Original film.

programme.title: When The LAPD Blows Up Your Neighborhood
programme.desc: Tensions rise on a busy street as news organizations and local residents witness an extremely volatile situation turn into a literal powder keg. A DOC+ Original.

programme.title: The Sentence Of Michael Thompson
programme.desc: In 1994, Michael Thompson was arrested for selling three pounds of cannabis and was sentenced to 42 to 60 years in prison. He is the longest serving non-violent offender in the history of Michigan and he is finally up for clemency. A DOCUMENTARY+ original.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"
programme.desc: Narrated by Tim Blake Nelson, this is an ode to the body's five senses delivered by a man with little time left to enjoy them. An Oscar nominated DOCUMENTARY+ Original. Directed by Jared and Jerusha Hess.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: Fight or Flight chronicles the journey of the first female pilot employed by Colorado Parks and Wildlife. Drawn to flying as a means to flee her early trauma, she pursues a career in professional aviation and discovers she must first assemble the tools required to face her past and heal. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Side By Side
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves takes an in-depth look at the future of digital cinema, featuring interviews with cinematic masters James Cameron, David Fincher, David Lynch, Martin Scorsese, Steven Soderbergh and more.

programme.title: Imprisoned by Love
programme.desc: Tracie, a devoted wife and mother, lives every day in fear at the hands of her abusive drunk husband Gerald. She does everything in her power to make a lifeless marriage work for the sake of her two loving children Jordan and Brittany. In the process, she almost loses everything. She feels trapped and alone in an abusive marriage that is spiraling into a bottomless abyss. Her friends and family serve as the voices of reason, but will the situation ever change or will Tracie continue to take the abuse and blame.

programme.title: Just A Measure of Faith
programme.desc: Husband Jacob handles all the challenges alone, refusing to allow God to help. His wife, Kayla, a strong believer tries to help overcome both of their problems and lead him in the direction of Faith. With their close knit community along with family, friends and the church, Jacob and Kayla will find the love and support they need.

programme.title: On The Court
programme.desc: Jordan, a mysterious figure who plays basketball by himself at night, decides to join a men's basketball league thanks to the encouragement of his new friend Kevin. Together with their new team of unskilled misfits, The Oranges, they embark in a city-wide tournament to win the goal. With fierce opponents like King Cain, the Bad Apples, and more, the Oranges will need to overcome obstacles on and off the court to become the best team they can be.

programme.title: The Underwoods of Napa Valley
programme.desc: Unemployed chef, Briana Rutledge, inherits her grandmother's cottage in Napa, California. She sets out to turn the cottage into her dream restaurant, but Tiffany Young and her father, restaurateur Nathaniel Young, plot to run Briana out of town.

programme.title: Street Dreams: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After a traumatic event that takes the life of a young Elijah Wilkins' childhood friend, Elijah meets an FBI agent that sets him on the right path. He vows to indirectly avenge his friend's death by becoming an undercover cop for the LAPD with hopes of working his way into the counterintelligence division of the FBI. When he stumbles upon a case involving domestic terrorism, Elijah sees this case as the perfect opportunity that could possibly usher him in the FBI, but not without risking it all.

programme.title: Because We're Done
programme.desc: A married man going thru a mid life crisis believes that the fate of his marriage rest solely in his hands. Only to learn that the ultimate decision will be made by his wife.

programme.title: Florrie
programme.desc: Florrie is dating 3 men. Juggling these men is catching up with her as is her complicated past. Her best friend Henrietta demands she picks just one of the committed boyfriends. Why is Florrie not able to accept love from any of these men?

programme.title: Love Possibly
programme.desc: Love possibly follows Alex, a hopelessly romantic, rom-com obsessed virgin on a quest to find love. Alex quickly finds himself out of his depth when Lana, a Moldovan mail-order bride makes the bold decision to move to London to marry him.

programme.title: The Bet
programme.desc: A woman makes a bet with her husband that she can get the next man she sees to propose. enter Albert, a lonely, eccentric man who believes he will never be loved, in this delightful, hilarious film about marriage, love and second chances.

programme.title: Murderers' Row
programme.desc: Matt Helm rescues the kidnapped inventor of an ultra-destructive "helio beam" capable of destroying Washington D.C.

programme.title: A Woman Of Distinction
programme.desc: A publicist's efforts to create a buzz about a British astronomer's visit create personal and professional problems for a career-minded dean of a women's college.

programme.title: Three For The Show
programme.desc: A Broadway musical comedy star marries her dead husband's songwriting partner, only to have husband number one show up at the wedding.

programme.title: Our Wife
programme.desc: A self-pitying, drunken composer finds inspiration in a new woman only to have his ex-wife decide that she now wants him back.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Emma moves to a ranch after a divorce and befriends the older Murphy, but then her ex shows up.

programme.title: I Dreamed Of Africa
programme.desc: A daughter of privilege gambles on love and a risky move to one of the most unyielding spots on Earth the wilds of Africa.

programme.title: Tempest
programme.desc: A man going through a mid-life crisis moves his family to Greece and falls in love with another woman.

programme.title: The Outlaw Stallion
programme.desc: A widowed mother and her son live a quiet life on their ranch until the boy's white stallion kills a gang leader's black stallion. Roberts, the evil outlaw, is determined to avenge his stallion's death and kidnaps the kid, his mother, and the horse. As with the horse battle, however, the white hats put an end to the menacing ways of the black hats.

programme.title: Fools' Parade
programme.desc: James Stewart as an ex-convict trying to get money owed to him by the bank.

programme.title: Brave Warrior
programme.desc: A federal government agent joins the legendary Chief Tecumseh in an effort to keep the British from inciting war between the Americans and the Shawnee.

programme.title: Blackjack Ketchum, Desperado
programme.desc: A legendary gunslinger joins his fiancee in outlaw-ruled Oxhorn, hoping to live down his deadly reputation.

programme.title: Wyoming Renegades
programme.desc: Brady Sutton, former member of the Butch Cassidy gang, returns from years in prison and tries to go straight.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer after he is responsible for a young mountain boy's death.

programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: Ponle Canela
programme.desc: El mundo del entretenimiento, la fama y el éxito a su alcance. Todas las Noticias del espectáculo: entrevistas exclusivas a deportistas, artistas y cantantes estrenos, conciertos, coberturas y mucho más.

programme.title: La Ruta del Sabor
programme.desc: La Ruta del Sabor - Caldo de Piedras, Oaxaca: Visitamos el mercado tradicional en la colorida ciudad de Oaxaca y nos aventuramos a probar las famosas carnes asadas, el chocolate Mayordomo y el caldo de piedra.

programme.title: La Ruta del Sabor
programme.desc: La Ruta del Sabor - Taco de Charales, Michoacán: Miguel llega al hermoso Pátzcuaro, Michoacán, donde saborea los tacos de charales con tortillas recién hechas a mano y el famoso tamal de charales.

programme.title: Amores que Engañan
programme.desc: Amores que Engañan - ¿Dónde Están mis Hijos?: Divorciada, Nora ahora tiene una vida apacible, hasta que el exmarido se lleva a los dos niños a un poblado lejano para que Nora no los pueda ver nunca más.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: El Talismán - Donación: Pedro se dirige a los Ángeles para encontrarse con el comprador de granos que quiere hacer una donación para el orfanato.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Eva Luna - Dirección: Liliana le cuenta a Daniel que Victoria se va a encontrar con Bruno, y le da la dirección del hotel con el número de habitación.

programme.title: La Clínica
programme.desc: La Clínica - Cuarto Acolchado: Elvicio encuentra a Lucy en el cuarto acolchonado y vuelven a platicar en confianza, ella le cuenta su situación y vuelven a ser amigos.

programme.title: Secretos de Villanas
programme.desc: Secretos de Villanas - S02E09 - ¿Cómo Durmieron?: Mientras las Villanas comparten en el jacuzzi, Gaby recibe una sorpresa que logra ponerla de buen humor.

programme.title: Amor real Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Doña Juana busca al general Domínguez para averiguar sobre la declaración de Amadeo Corona y él le dice que tiene una declaración firmada, donde niega todo vínculo con Fuentes Guerra. Manuel retira su dinero del banco.

programme.title: Corazón Indomable Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Esther le dice a José Antonio que es tarde para no ser nada, pues está embarazada. Raiza le informa a María Alejandra que Karim compró parte del casino.

programme.title: Fuego en la Sangre Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Ósar decide abandonar el pueblo y se despide de todos sus seres queridos. Jimena evita que Óscar se vaya del pueblo con Maracuyá y le confiesa que lo ama.

programme.title: Al Diablo con los Guapos Capítulo 63
programme.desc: La mamá de Gloria aparece en el convento. Damián utiliza a Gamuza para hacer quedar mal a Constancio ante los medios y así obligarlo a dar un donativo a una fundación. Alejandro encuentra a Hugo en el departamento de Andrea.

programme.title: Vino el amor Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Bobby encuentra unos folletos de un internado en el cuarto de Graciela y se escapa de la casa porque piensa que lo mandarán a estudiar allá. Lilian le pide a Brian que vaya al viñedo porque Bobby desapareció.

programme.title: Amor real Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Doña Juana busca al general Domínguez para averiguar sobre la declaración de Amadeo Corona y él le dice que tiene una declaración firmada, donde niega todo vínculo con Fuentes Guerra. Manuel retira su dinero del banco.

programme.title: Corazón Indomable Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Esther le dice a José Antonio que es tarde para no ser nada, pues está embarazada. Raiza le informa a María Alejandra que Karim compró parte del casino.

programme.title: Destilando Amor Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Aarón le entrega a Oñate el dinero que supuestamente le entregó a Gaviota para alejarse. Gaviota y Rodrigo sufren al sentirse traicionados. Sofía termina por caer antes los encantos de Francisco.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Teresa recibe de Arturo un lujoso auto como regalo de bodas. Mariano descubre que Teresa sí se casa. Mariano interrumpe la ceremonia, Teresa le da una cachetada. Teresa y Arturo se convierten en marido y mujer.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 22
programme.desc: Angélica obliga a Marimar a levantar una pulsera del lodo con los dientes, después la acusa de haberle robado las joyas y es detenida por la policía.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 73
programme.desc: Alicia sufre al saber que debe regresar a casa de Soraya. María idea un plan para evitar que Soraya maltrate a Alicia. Nandito enfrenta a Soraya para pedirle que se aleje de su familia.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 74
programme.desc: Soraya planea todo para que culpen a Nandito de la muerte de la Nana Calixta. María se molesta con Luis Fernando porque continúa bebiendo.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 67
programme.desc: Berenice le asegura a Jorge Luis que Meche no está loca. Jorge Luis está preocupado por Meche y la visita en la clínica. Meche se escapa de la clínica psiquiátrica.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 68
programme.desc: Malvina teme que la policía descubra que ella es la responsable de la desaparición de María Mercedes. María Mercedes decide darles todo su dinero a los Del Olmo.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 21
programme.desc: Angélica le regala ropa y algunas joyas a Marimar para después acusarla de ladrona. Marimar se entera que está embarazada de Sergio.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 22
programme.desc: Angélica obliga a Marimar a levantar una pulsera del lodo con los dientes, después la acusa de haberle robado las joyas y es detenida por la policía.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Teresa le deja claro a Fernando que no tendrá intimidad con él hasta que estén casados. Teresa le revela a Aída que Genoveva es amante de Rubén. La policía detiene a Mariano por ser sospechoso principal de la muerte de Fito.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Fernando estalla de celos cuando se entera que Teresa está defendiendo a Mariano junto con Arturo. Teresa ve a Arturo y Lucía besándose. Oriana le ofrece mucho dinero a Teresa para que se aleje de Fernando, ella considera la propuesta.

programme.title: Lo Que La Vida Me Robó Capítulo 107
programme.desc: La avioneta donde viajan Alejandro, Nadia y Víctor sufre un grave accidente y se estrella en el mar. Montserrat cree que José Luis la quiso matar.

programme.title: Lo Que La Vida Me Robó Capítulo 108
programme.desc: Dimitrio le informa a Rosario y Montserrat que nadie sobrevivió al accidente. José Luis le dice al Capitán Robledo que ayudará a Montserrat económicamente, pero que ella no puede saberlo.

programme.title: Lo Que La Vida Me Robó Capítulo 109
programme.desc: Ha pasado el tiempo y Montserrat sigue sufriendo por la partida de Alejando. Dimitrio le dice a Montserrat que José Luis ya va a salir de la cárcel.

programme.title: Lo Que La Vida Me Robó Capítulo 110
programme.desc: Graciela le revela a Fabiola que sabe la verdad sobre su pasado y le pide que le dé la parte de su herencia. José Luis le dice a Esmeralda que está dispuesto a recuperar el amor de Montserrat.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Teresa se entera que Fernando puso a nombre de Luisa la mansión De La Barrera y se enoja mucho. Luego chantajea a Fernando para que ponga la casa a nombre de ella. A Juana y Cutberto les niegan la adopción de un niño.

programme.title: Teresa Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Teresa se entera que Rubén es amante de Genoveva. Fito amenaza a Rubén con una pistola, Genoveva lo golpea y lo mata. Teresa es testigo de cómo Rubén y Genoveva se deshacen del cuerpo de Fito.

programme.title: Imperio de Mentiras Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Darío le dice a Fabricio que cambiará su declaración y le pide que juntos destruyan a Eugenio. Eugenio le dice a Fabricio que se gane la confianza de Fernanda para quitarle a su hijo y después asesinarla. Elisa es vinculada a proceso.

programme.title: La Gata Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Gisela le dice a Fernando que es un asesino y la amenaza para que se mantenga alejada de su familia. Mariano le dice a Gisela que está seguro de que ella provocó el accidente de Pablo.

programme.title: La Que No Podía Amar Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Rogelio teme que Margarito quede paralitico después de su accidente. Cynthia se encela al ver a Ana Paula abrazada de Gustavo. Efraín decide seducir a Macaria para llevar a cabo sus planes de venganza contra Rogelio.

programme.title: Sortilegio Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Ulises idea un plan junto con Elena para secuestrar al bebé de María José. Maura enfurece al saber que Alex planea casarse con María José. María José llora al saber que Pedro ha sido golpeado en la cárcel.

programme.title: Abismo de Pasión Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Damián lleva serenata a la casa de Elisa y le grita que es lo peor que le ha pasado en la vida. Alfonsina le aconseja a Florencia que aproveche que tiene el camino libre para reconquistar a Damián. Elisa y Damián tienen el corazón destrozado.

programme.title: Soy Tu Dueña Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Ivana enfurece al saber que Valentina ha decidido casarse con José Miguel. José Miguel idea un plan para evitar que Valentina piense que se casa con ella solo por interés. Valentina le cuenta a Benita el por qué se enamoró de José Miguel.

programme.title: La Usurpadora Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Paulina está decidida a quedarse en la cárcel y rechaza la ayuda de Edmundo. Estefanía le entrega sus joyas a Willy para que consiga dinero y puedan pagar la clínica. Lourdes se niega a darle dinero a Osvaldo para pagar la defensa de Paulina.

programme.title: Hotel Todo Incluido Capítulo 2
programme.desc: Los preparativos de una boda en el Hotel Todo Incluido desencadenan situaciones poco comunes con el personal y los huespedes.

programme.title: Nosotros Los Guapos Capítulo 21
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden viajar a Las Vegas para probar suerte en los juegos de azar, mientras que Natacha le mide los gastos a Doña Cuca y Don Nacho. Vítor comienza a tener suerte gracias a Albertano e incrementan su fortuna.

programme.title: Nosotros Los Guapos Capítulo 22
programme.desc: Vítor quiere conquistar a una chica aficionada a las motos, por lo que convence a Albertano de formar una pandilla de motociclistas. Las situación se complica cuando Vítor tiene que competir en una carrera contra el líder de la pandilla rival.

programme.title: María de Todos Los Ángeles
programme.desc: María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: María de Todos Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa le regala un nuevo refrigerador a Doña Lucha, pero no le gusta porque le da órdenes.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido amenaza a Aldolfo con correrlo de la casa si no aporta dinero, así que este tratará de empeñar una cadenita, la cual desaparece misteriosamente. Plutarco trabajará como sobrecargo y averigua cómo le irá a Martina ahora que decidió ponerse a dieta.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Debido a los celos y a su incompatibilidad de caracteres, Gaby y Plutarco deciden separarse, mira con quién se quedará Justito. Además, conoce al nuevo novio de Martina y ve si le caerá bien a la familia.

programme.title: La Familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica se encuentra con su amiga Columba y las indirectas entre ellas no se hacen esperar. Federica quiere vengarse de que Columba y Bacilio les ganaron en el dominó. Los P. Luche le organizan una fiesta de despedida a Columba y su esposo.

programme.title: La Familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico está muy triste porque Federica está terriblemente enferma. Ludovico la lleva al hospital para que la operen.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Es fin de semana y Fran se va a dormir con su papá, pero Paco tiene planes y se va a una boda con Miranda su novia. Fran se queda solo en casa e invita a dormir a Lola. A la mañana siguiente los 4 desayunan y se presentan.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Rocío llega a casa de Paco y Miranda para quedarse el fin de semana porque se metió un ratón a su casa y están fumigando. Miranda le pide a Paco que corra a Rocío de su casa, pero él le dice que no puede porque es la madre de Fran.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos. El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, sólo que Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. Averigua cuál será el nombre completo de su hijo y quiénes serán sus padrinos. Además, checa qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León se enoja con Mabel y averigua dónde está Diego.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta consuela a Diego y le pregunta si realmente lo ama.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Giovanni contrata a unos actores para que se hagan pasar por sus papás.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Raquel descubre que los presuntos papás de Giovanni son actores. León al ver triste a Diego, le afirma que el hombre es quien debe dominar a las mujeres y se confrontan en un duelo de box. Franco se entera que Carlo fue detenido por estar en las carreras.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina desea ser monja porque Augusto terminó con ella. Paula busca a Diego y le pide que regresen. Damiana organiza una cena, para que Celina conozca a Francisco. Diego perdona a Paola, pero no regresa con ella. Roberta besa a Simón por venganza.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Nico termina su noviazgo con Karen. Para herir a Roberta, Paula le dice que se reconcilió con Diego. Teo es aceptado en la Logia. Mía le reclama a Roberta que haya usurpado su identidad. En lugar de Teo, Miguel planea asistir a su ceremonia de iniciación.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lupita habla con Pilar y le dice que se la pasa bien con Tomás, pero con el solo escuchar el nombre de Nico, todo se le olvida. El padre de Diego le regala un auto lo cual le molesta, porque solo trata de comprar su cariño. Teo es capturado por La Logia.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 134
programme.desc: Roberta visita a Josefina en la cárcel, está furiosa por saber o intuir que su madre fue la causante de la muerte de su ex prometido, se da cuenta que Regina hubiera sido mejor mamá que su madre adoptiva.

programme.title: Cañaveral de Pasiones Capítulo 37
programme.desc: Gina visita a Julia desesperada porque Pablo quiere terminar con elle por que su amor es de otra. Dinorah le dice a Fausto que está celosa de Margarita porque sabe que él no la ha olvidado. Gina trata de seducir a Pablo, pero él la rechaza.

programme.title: Cañaveral de Pasiones Capítulo 38
programme.desc: Diego intenta seducir y provoca a Dinorah. Josefina le cuenta a Ilda que Pablo encontró a Julia con Guillermo y lo golpeó. Julia le reclama a Prudencia por decirle a Mireya que Gina habló con ella.

programme.title: Cañaveral de Pasiones Capítulo 39
programme.desc: Paulo le dice a su mamá que está decidido a ir a la Ciudad de México ella le sugiere pensar mejor las cosas antes de actuar. Lety le cuenta a su mamá que está deprimida porque Guillermo no la quiere.

programme.title: Cañaveral de Pasiones Capítulo 40
programme.desc: Pablo le dice a Julia que viajará a la ciudad con Gina por el accidente que tuvo. Guillermo le dice a su padre que no quiere trabajar con él. Josefina descubre que Gina le mintió, pues se da cuenta que si puede caminar.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 131
programme.desc: Gonzalo se encuentra muy grave en el hospital luchando por vivir debido al impacto de arma de fuego que le propició Josefina, Regina de igual manera está hospitalizada pero no de gravedad como Gonzalo.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 132
programme.desc: Álvaro se encuentra en la calle y a lo lejos se ve a una mujer que viene hacía él hablando por celular entonces él aprovecha y la aborda rápidamente la empuja y se va para atrás.

programme.title: Cuando Me Enamoro Capítulo 133
programme.desc: Josefina se encuentra dentro de la cárcel con sus malos pensamientos deseando que Gonzalo y su pareja se mueran, quiere matar a Renata y siente que la va a matar por que no quiere que nadie sea feliz.

programme.title: El mundo loco de los jóvenes
programme.desc: Un famoso cantante intenta seducir a una chica cantante, primero como una apuesta con sus amigos, pero poco a poco se va enamorando de ella. ¡Ahora, sus amigos deben tomar el relevo o se quedarán en el polvo!

programme.title: Con quién andan nuestras hijas
programme.desc: La historia de un grupo de jóvenes y los problemas a los que se enfrentan dentro de una sociedad moderna que poco a poco entra en decadencia, debido a la desintegración familiar y a la pérdida de valores.

programme.title: El Cristo de los milagros
programme.desc: Un grupo de bandidos planea el robo de la Iglesia. Un niño que se gana la vida como vendedor ambulante es utilizado para informar sobre las pertenencias del Sacerdote. Una turista se entera del robo y pronto la secuestran.

programme.title: Novias impacientes
programme.desc: Un pintor, un médico y el hijo de un millonario son objeto de un enredo en un edificio. Ellos devuelven la broma y conocen a unas mujeres, con quienes inician un noviazgo. Pero una confusión provoca que el amor de Marta y Carlos casi llegue a su fin.

programme.title: Acá las tortas
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige un pequeño, pero muy exitoso restaurante. El único fracaso de los suyos es, quizás, su hijo Vicente, un hombre borracho y atormentado. Sus hijos se avergüenzan porque su negocio es demasiado vulgar.

programme.title: Una golfa
programme.desc: La vida de Diana y Luis se cruzan en un cabaret. Ella creció en las calles, sin conocer otra forma de ganar dinero que aprovechar su belleza actuando en centros nocturnos. Luis es trompetista y está involucrado involuntariamente en la venta de droga.

programme.title: Los Sánchez deben morir
programme.desc: Gaspar no logra impedir que sus mujeriegos hijos eludan por quinta vez el matrimonio. Luego de provocar una pelea los hermanos Sánchez no saben donde ir y menos ahora que los han acusado de una muerte.

programme.title: El vestido de novia
programme.desc: Un ingeniero lleva a una prostituta al campamento maderero donde trabaja ya que sólo se admiten a empleados casados. Las cosas se ponen un poco agitadas cuando las otras esposas comienzan a hablar sobre cuánto tiempo han estado casadas.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Al peligro con tiento y al remedio con tiempo'
programme.desc: Una joven cansada del carácter estricto de su madre decide irse a vivir con su papá, sin imaginar que la vida despreocupada de su padre comenzará a afectarla.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud'
programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.title: Como Dice El Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Yerros de amor, dignos son de perdón'
programme.desc: Una joven queda embarazada de su novio, pero teme que él la rechace al enterarse, por lo que busca un momento para confesarle la noticia sin imaginar que un accidente le cambiaría la vida.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Más vale pedir perdón, que pedir permiso'
programme.desc: Un joven se enamora de una mujer sin saber que en realidad es su madre, quien ha regresado de los Estados Unidos para conocerlo y recuperar el amor de su padre.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Doncellez y preñez, no puede ser a la vez'
programme.desc: Una joven sueña con dedicarse al baile a pesar de la oposición de su padre. La joven y sus amigas entran a una academía de baile con uno de los mejores profesores, sin saber que su amistad se verá fracturada por las oscuras intenciones del maestro.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'En casa del pobre, el que no trabaja no come'
programme.desc: Una joven descubre lo mucho que su mamá sufre y hace para mantener un hogar machista cuando sufre un infarto y ella debe encargarse de los quehaceres de la casa.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer se encuentra en condiciones de extrema pobreza y decide abandonar a su hija en casa de su madre. Debido a su enfermedad, la abuela recurre a la tía de la niña para que la ayude a cuidarla, pero las cosas no salen como ellas esperan.

programme.title: Como Dice el Dicho
programme.sub-title: 'Más vale pájaro en mano que ciento volando'
programme.desc: Después de perder a sus padres, una joven se va a vivir a casa de su padrino. La joven busca progresar en el diseño de modas, pero su padrino pone freno a su entusiasmo haciéndole ver que aún no está preparada y que debe aprender.

programme.title: Pequeños Gigantes Programa 7
programme.desc: El cantante Flex se presenta en el escenario de Pequeños Gigantes. Los bailarines se enfrentan con ritmos de cumbia y merengue. Los capitanes concursan con los jueces en pruebas de habilidad y destreza.

programme.title: Pequeños Gigantes Programa 8

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Andrea and Wayne see Real Potential
programme.desc: As this newlywed's family starts to grow it's time for their home to do the same. Andrea and Wayne are hunting for charm and character that for one means turnkey and for the other means DIY. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses that are livable, but somewhat needy. Once Andrea and Wayne buy, Sarah renovates the room they can't figure out, setting them on course for future renos!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Truc and Eric see Real Potential
programme.desc: Judging by Truc's massive shoe collection and Eric's DJ gear, these two have long grown out of their tiny city apartment. Their failed home to date search has been driven solely by charm and character. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes that tick these boxes with extra storage to boot. Once Truc and Eric buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that allows them to live larger than ever!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jasmine and Kevin see Real Potential
programme.desc: They first thought buying a home would be easy. Seven months later Jasmine and Kevin are still living in a hotel room, undecided whether they should live downtown or in the suburbs. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, betting that she can help them bridge their location tug of war. Once Jasmine and Kevin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that puts a lasting polish on a diamond in the rough!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Living in a construction zone is an unpleasant reality for homeowners undertaking a renovation. The hope is that the mess and discomfort will be as short lived as possible. For Alex and Marie and their 2 children, a planned 3-month renovation dragged out to a year and a half with no end in sight. They were beginning to feel like prisoners in their own home- until Mike and the team arrive on the scene.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: When Jeff discovers that his newly built house has a crumbling concrete foundation with one third of the minimum strength required by code, he calls Mike Holmes to save his home. Mike and the HOH team build a new custom foundation within walls of the existing foundation and devise a plan to protect the weakened exterior from further damage.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is story about hope for the future in the face of heartbreaking tragedy, when "Making It Right" takes on a new meaning- completing an unresolved renovation and making it possible for a family to finally begin the healing process after the loss of a loved one. The connection between the emotional health of a family and condition of their home is a strong one. Mike and the team heal a house left in limbo, and make it a home once more.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Janet and her elderly mother, Audrey, upgraded their vinyl kitchen floor to ceramic tile. Shortly after the work was completed, they noticed hairline cracks through the centre of the tiles. The flooring contractor explained it wasn't his fault, and that the weak structure of their home was shifting and causing the floor to crack. But the cracks were forming through the ceramic tile, and not along the grout lines- the weakest part of a tile floor. Mike and the team put on their investigative hard hats and get to the bottom of this tile flooring issue.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This Home Bar Has It's Own Keg And A Built-In Wine Chiller
programme.desc: In this episode General and Cristina Judd from Me and General Design tackle the playroom. This family-friendly lounge is packed with everything you need for your pod. From a surfboard sound system to a bar with a mini kitchen with its own and not to mention a beer tap. If this bar is the place to be then we don't know what is.

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.
